children.label: MAIN-PARA
children.name: MAIN-PARA
children.originalText: MAIN-PARA.

children.label: SETERR-FLG-OFFT
children.name: SETERR-FLG-OFFT
children.originalText: SET ERR-FLG-OFF     TO TRUE

children.label: SETUSR-MODIFIED
children.name: SETUSR-MODIFIED
children.originalText: SET USR-MODIFIED-NO TO TRUE

children.label: MOVESPACESTOWS-
children.name: MOVESPACESTOWS-
children.originalText:
MOVE SPACES TO WS-MESSAGE
                          ERRMSGO OF COUSR2AO

children.label: MOVE'COSGN00C'T
children.name: MOVE'COSGN00C'T
children.originalText: MOVE 'COSGN00C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM

children.label: PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
children.name: PERFORMRETURN-T
children.originalText: PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN

children.label: Yes
children.name: Yes
children.originalText:
MOVE 'COSGN00C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
               PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN

children.label: ELSE
children.name: ELSE
children.originalText: ELSE

children.label: MOVEDFHCOMMAREA
children.name: MOVEDFHCOMMAREA
children.originalText: MOVE DFHCOMMAREA(1:EIBCALEN) TO CARDDEMO-COMMAREA

children.label: SETCDEMO-PGM-RE
children.name: SETCDEMO-PGM-RE
children.originalText: SET CDEMO-PGM-REENTER    TO TRUE

children.label: MOVELOW-VALUEST
children.name: MOVELOW-VALUEST
children.originalText: MOVE LOW-VALUES          TO COUSR2AO

children.label: MOVE-1TOUSRIDIN
children.name: MOVE-1TOUSRIDIN
children.originalText: MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR2AI

children.label: MOVECDEMO-CU02-
children.name: MOVECDEMO-CU02-
children.originalText:
MOVE CDEMO-CU02-USR-SELECTED TO
                            USRIDINI OF COUSR2AI

children.label: PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
children.name: PERFORMPROCESS-
children.originalText: PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY

children.label: Yes
children.name: Yes
children.originalText:
MOVE CDEMO-CU02-USR-SELECTED TO
                            USRIDINI OF COUSR2AI
                       PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY

children.label:
IS 
CDEMO-CU02-USR-SELECTED NOT =
          ?
children.name:
IS 
CDEMO-CU02-USR-SELECTED NOT =
          ?
children.originalText:
IF CDEMO-CU02-USR-SELECTED NOT =
                                              SPACES AND LOW-VALUES
                       MOVE CDEMO-CU02-USR-SELECTED TO
                            USRIDINI OF COUSR2AI
                       PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                   END-IF

children.label: PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
children.name: PERFORMSEND-USR
children.originalText: PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN

children.label: Yes
children.name: Yes
children.originalText:
SET CDEMO-PGM-REENTER    TO TRUE
                   MOVE LOW-VALUES          TO COUSR2AO
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR2AI
                   IF CDEMO-CU02-USR-SELECTED NOT =
                                              SPACES AND LOW-VALUES
                       MOVE CDEMO-CU02-USR-SELECTED TO
                            USRIDINI OF COUSR2AI
                       PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                   END-IF
                   PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN

children.label: ELSE
children.name: ELSE
children.originalText: ELSE

children.label: PERFORM RECEIVE-USRUPD-SCREEN
children.name: PERFORMRECEIVE-
children.originalText: PERFORM RECEIVE-USRUPD-SCREEN

children.label: EVALUATE
children.name: EVALUATE
children.originalText:
EVALUATE EIBAID
                       WHEN DFHENTER
                           PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                       WHEN DFHPF3
                           PERFORM UPDATE-USER-INFO
                           IF CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                               MOVE 'COADM01C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           ELSE
                               MOVE CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM TO
                               CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           END-IF
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF4
                           PERFORM CLEAR-CURRENT-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF5
                           PERFORM UPDATE-USER-INFO
                       WHEN DFHPF12
                           MOVE 'COADM01C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN OTHER
                           MOVE 'Y'                       TO WS-ERR-FLG
                           MOVE CCDA-MSG-INVALID-KEY      TO WS-MESSAGE
                           PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
                   END-EVALUATE

children.label: No
children.name: No
children.originalText:
ELSE
                   PERFORM RECEIVE-USRUPD-SCREEN
                   EVALUATE EIBAID
                       WHEN DFHENTER
                           PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                       WHEN DFHPF3
                           PERFORM UPDATE-USER-INFO
                           IF CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                               MOVE 'COADM01C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           ELSE
                               MOVE CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM TO
                               CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           END-IF
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF4
                           PERFORM CLEAR-CURRENT-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF5
                           PERFORM UPDATE-USER-INFO
                       WHEN DFHPF12
                           MOVE 'COADM01C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN OTHER
                           MOVE 'Y'                       TO WS-ERR-FLG
                           MOVE CCDA-MSG-INVALID-KEY      TO WS-MESSAGE
                           PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
                   END-EVALUATE

children.label:
IS 
NOT CDEMO-PGM-REENTER?
children.name:
IS 
NOT CDEMO-PGM-REENTER?
children.originalText:
IF NOT CDEMO-PGM-REENTER
                   SET CDEMO-PGM-REENTER    TO TRUE
                   MOVE LOW-VALUES          TO COUSR2AO
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR2AI
                   IF CDEMO-CU02-USR-SELECTED NOT =
                                              SPACES AND LOW-VALUES
                       MOVE CDEMO-CU02-USR-SELECTED TO
                            USRIDINI OF COUSR2AI
                       PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                   END-IF
                   PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
               ELSE
                   PERFORM RECEIVE-USRUPD-SCREEN
                   EVALUATE EIBAID
                       WHEN DFHENTER
                           PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                       WHEN DFHPF3
                           PERFORM UPDATE-USER-INFO
                           IF CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                               MOVE 'COADM01C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           ELSE
                               MOVE CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM TO
                               CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           END-IF
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF4
                           PERFORM CLEAR-CURRENT-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF5
                           PERFORM UPDATE-USER-INFO
                       WHEN DFHPF12
                           MOVE 'COADM01C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN OTHER
                           MOVE 'Y'                       TO WS-ERR-FLG
                           MOVE CCDA-MSG-INVALID-KEY      TO WS-MESSAGE
                           PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
                   END-EVALUATE
               END-IF

children.label: No
children.name: No
children.originalText:
ELSE
               MOVE DFHCOMMAREA(1:EIBCALEN) TO CARDDEMO-COMMAREA
               IF NOT CDEMO-PGM-REENTER
                   SET CDEMO-PGM-REENTER    TO TRUE
                   MOVE LOW-VALUES          TO COUSR2AO
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR2AI
                   IF CDEMO-CU02-USR-SELECTED NOT =
                                              SPACES AND LOW-VALUES
                       MOVE CDEMO-CU02-USR-SELECTED TO
                            USRIDINI OF COUSR2AI
                       PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                   END-IF
                   PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
               ELSE
                   PERFORM RECEIVE-USRUPD-SCREEN
                   EVALUATE EIBAID
                       WHEN DFHENTER
                           PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                       WHEN DFHPF3
                           PERFORM UPDATE-USER-INFO
                           IF CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                               MOVE 'COADM01C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           ELSE
                               MOVE CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM TO
                               CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           END-IF
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF4
                           PERFORM CLEAR-CURRENT-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF5
                           PERFORM UPDATE-USER-INFO
                       WHEN DFHPF12
                           MOVE 'COADM01C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN OTHER
                           MOVE 'Y'                       TO WS-ERR-FLG
                           MOVE CCDA-MSG-INVALID-KEY      TO WS-MESSAGE
                           PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
                   END-EVALUATE
               END-IF

children.label:
IS 
EIBCALEN = 0?
children.name:
IS 
EIBCALEN = 0?
children.originalText:
IF EIBCALEN = 0
               MOVE 'COSGN00C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
               PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
           ELSE
               MOVE DFHCOMMAREA(1:EIBCALEN) TO CARDDEMO-COMMAREA
               IF NOT CDEMO-PGM-REENTER
                   SET CDEMO-PGM-REENTER    TO TRUE
                   MOVE LOW-VALUES          TO COUSR2AO
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR2AI
                   IF CDEMO-CU02-USR-SELECTED NOT =
                                              SPACES AND LOW-VALUES
                       MOVE CDEMO-CU02-USR-SELECTED TO
                            USRIDINI OF COUSR2AI
                       PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                   END-IF
                   PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
               ELSE
                   PERFORM RECEIVE-USRUPD-SCREEN
                   EVALUATE EIBAID
                       WHEN DFHENTER
                           PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                       WHEN DFHPF3
                           PERFORM UPDATE-USER-INFO
                           IF CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                               MOVE 'COADM01C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           ELSE
                               MOVE CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM TO
                               CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           END-IF
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF4
                           PERFORM CLEAR-CURRENT-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF5
                           PERFORM UPDATE-USER-INFO
                       WHEN DFHPF12
                           MOVE 'COADM01C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN OTHER
                           MOVE 'Y'                       TO WS-ERR-FLG
                           MOVE CCDA-MSG-INVALID-KEY      TO WS-MESSAGE
                           PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
                   END-EVALUATE
               END-IF
           END-IF

children.label: SETERR-FLG-OFFT
children.name: SETERR-FLG-OFFT
children.originalText:
SET ERR-FLG-OFF     TO TRUE
           SET USR-MODIFIED-NO TO TRUE
       
           MOVE SPACES TO WS-MESSAGE
                          ERRMSGO OF COUSR2AO
       
           IF EIBCALEN = 0
               MOVE 'COSGN00C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
               PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
           ELSE
               MOVE DFHCOMMAREA(1:EIBCALEN) TO CARDDEMO-COMMAREA
               IF NOT CDEMO-PGM-REENTER
                   SET CDEMO-PGM-REENTER    TO TRUE
                   MOVE LOW-VALUES          TO COUSR2AO
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR2AI
                   IF CDEMO-CU02-USR-SELECTED NOT =
                                              SPACES AND LOW-VALUES
                       MOVE CDEMO-CU02-USR-SELECTED TO
                            USRIDINI OF COUSR2AI
                       PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                   END-IF
                   PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
               ELSE
                   PERFORM RECEIVE-USRUPD-SCREEN
                   EVALUATE EIBAID
                       WHEN DFHENTER
                           PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                       WHEN DFHPF3
                           PERFORM UPDATE-USER-INFO
                           IF CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                               MOVE 'COADM01C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           ELSE
                               MOVE CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM TO
                               CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           END-IF
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF4
                           PERFORM CLEAR-CURRENT-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF5
                           PERFORM UPDATE-USER-INFO
                       WHEN DFHPF12
                           MOVE 'COADM01C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN OTHER
                           MOVE 'Y'                       TO WS-ERR-FLG
                           MOVE CCDA-MSG-INVALID-KEY      TO WS-MESSAGE
                           PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
                   END-EVALUATE
               END-IF
           END-IF
       
           _DIALECT_ 1 ​​​​ ​​​​ ​​​​​​
                     ​​​​​​​ ​​​​​​​​​​​
           ​​​​​​​​.

children.label: PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
children.name: PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
children.originalText: PROCESS-ENTER-KEY.

children.label: EVALUATE
children.name: EVALUATE
children.originalText:
EVALUATE TRUE
               WHEN USRIDINI OF COUSR2AI = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'User ID can NOT be empty...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR2AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR2AI
                   CONTINUE
           END-EVALUATE

children.label: MOVESPACESTOFNA
children.name: MOVESPACESTOFNA
children.originalText:
MOVE SPACES      TO FNAMEI   OF COUSR2AI
                                   LNAMEI   OF COUSR2AI
                                   PASSWDI  OF COUSR2AI
                                   USRTYPEI OF COUSR2AI

children.label: MOVEUSRIDINIOFC
children.name: MOVEUSRIDINIOFC
children.originalText: MOVE USRIDINI  OF COUSR2AI TO SEC-USR-ID

children.label: PERFORM READ-USER-SEC-FILE
children.name: PERFORMREAD-USE
children.originalText: PERFORM READ-USER-SEC-FILE

children.label: Yes
children.name: Yes
children.originalText:
MOVE SPACES      TO FNAMEI   OF COUSR2AI
                                   LNAMEI   OF COUSR2AI
                                   PASSWDI  OF COUSR2AI
                                   USRTYPEI OF COUSR2AI
               MOVE USRIDINI  OF COUSR2AI TO SEC-USR-ID
               PERFORM READ-USER-SEC-FILE

children.label:
IS 
NOT ERR-FLG-ON?
children.name:
IS 
NOT ERR-FLG-ON?
children.originalText:
IF NOT ERR-FLG-ON
               MOVE SPACES      TO FNAMEI   OF COUSR2AI
                                   LNAMEI   OF COUSR2AI
                                   PASSWDI  OF COUSR2AI
                                   USRTYPEI OF COUSR2AI
               MOVE USRIDINI  OF COUSR2AI TO SEC-USR-ID
               PERFORM READ-USER-SEC-FILE
           END-IF

children.label: EVALUATETRUEWHE
children.name: EVALUATETRUEWHE
children.originalText:
EVALUATE TRUE
               WHEN USRIDINI OF COUSR2AI = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'User ID can NOT be empty...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR2AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR2AI
                   CONTINUE
           END-EVALUATE
       
           IF NOT ERR-FLG-ON
               MOVE SPACES      TO FNAMEI   OF COUSR2AI
                                   LNAMEI   OF COUSR2AI
                                   PASSWDI  OF COUSR2AI
                                   USRTYPEI OF COUSR2AI
               MOVE USRIDINI  OF COUSR2AI TO SEC-USR-ID
               PERFORM READ-USER-SEC-FILE
           END-IF.

children.label: MOVESEC-USR-FNA
children.name: MOVESEC-USR-FNA
children.originalText: MOVE SEC-USR-FNAME      TO FNAMEI    OF COUSR2AI

children.label: MOVESEC-USR-LNA
children.name: MOVESEC-USR-LNA
children.originalText: MOVE SEC-USR-LNAME      TO LNAMEI    OF COUSR2AI

children.label: MOVESEC-USR-PWD
children.name: MOVESEC-USR-PWD
children.originalText: MOVE SEC-USR-PWD        TO PASSWDI   OF COUSR2AI

children.label: MOVESEC-USR-TYP
children.name: MOVESEC-USR-TYP
children.originalText: MOVE SEC-USR-TYPE       TO USRTYPEI  OF COUSR2AI

children.label: PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
children.name: PERFORMSEND-USR
children.originalText: PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN

children.label: Yes
children.name: Yes
children.originalText:
MOVE SEC-USR-FNAME      TO FNAMEI    OF COUSR2AI
               MOVE SEC-USR-LNAME      TO LNAMEI    OF COUSR2AI
               MOVE SEC-USR-PWD        TO PASSWDI   OF COUSR2AI
               MOVE SEC-USR-TYPE       TO USRTYPEI  OF COUSR2AI
               PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN

children.label:
IS 
NOT ERR-FLG-ON?
children.name:
IS 
NOT ERR-FLG-ON?
children.originalText:
IF NOT ERR-FLG-ON
               MOVE SEC-USR-FNAME      TO FNAMEI    OF COUSR2AI
               MOVE SEC-USR-LNAME      TO LNAMEI    OF COUSR2AI
               MOVE SEC-USR-PWD        TO PASSWDI   OF COUSR2AI
               MOVE SEC-USR-TYPE       TO USRTYPEI  OF COUSR2AI
               PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
           END-IF

children.label: IFNOTERR-FLG-ON
children.name: IFNOTERR-FLG-ON
children.originalText:
IF NOT ERR-FLG-ON
               MOVE SEC-USR-FNAME      TO FNAMEI    OF COUSR2AI
               MOVE SEC-USR-LNAME      TO LNAMEI    OF COUSR2AI
               MOVE SEC-USR-PWD        TO PASSWDI   OF COUSR2AI
               MOVE SEC-USR-TYPE       TO USRTYPEI  OF COUSR2AI
               PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
           END-IF.

children.label: UPDATE-USER-INFO
children.name: UPDATE-USER-INFO
children.originalText: UPDATE-USER-INFO.

children.label: EVALUATE
children.name: EVALUATE
children.originalText:
EVALUATE TRUE
               WHEN USRIDINI OF COUSR2AI = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'User ID can NOT be empty...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR2AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
               WHEN FNAMEI OF COUSR2AI = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'First Name can NOT be empty...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO FNAMEL OF COUSR2AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
               WHEN LNAMEI OF COUSR2AI = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Last Name can NOT be empty...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO LNAMEL OF COUSR2AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
               WHEN PASSWDI OF COUSR2AI = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Password can NOT be empty...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO PASSWDL OF COUSR2AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
               WHEN USRTYPEI OF COUSR2AI = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'User Type can NOT be empty...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USRTYPEL OF COUSR2AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
                   MOVE -1       TO FNAMEL OF COUSR2AI
                   CONTINUE
           END-EVALUATE

children.name: MOVEUSRIDINIOFC
children.originalText: MOVE USRIDINI  OF COUSR2AI TO SEC-USR-ID

children.name: PERFORMREAD-USE
children.originalText: PERFORM READ-USER-SEC-FILE

children.name: MOVEFNAMEIOFCOU

children.name: SETUSR-MODIFIED
children.originalText: SET USR-MODIFIED-YES TO TRUE

MOVE FNAMEI   OF COUSR2AI TO SEC-USR-FNAME
                   SET USR-MODIFIED-YES TO TRUE

IS 
FNAMEI  OF COUSR2AI NOT = SEC-USR-FNAME?

IS 
FNAMEI  OF COUSR2AI NOT = SEC-USR-FNAME?

IF FNAMEI  OF COUSR2AI NOT = SEC-USR-FNAME

                   SET USR-MODIFIED-YES TO TRUE
               END-IF

IS

children.name:
IS 
LNAMEI  OF COUSR2AI NOT = SEC-USR-LNAME?

IF LNAMEI  OF COUSR2AI NOT = SEC-USR-LNAME
                   MOVE LNAMEI   OF COUSR2AI TO SEC-USR-LNAME

children.label: SETUSR-MODIFIED
children.name: SETUSR-MODIFIED
children.originalText: SET USR-MODIFIED-YES TO TRUE

MOVE PASSWDI  OF COUSR2AI TO SEC-USR-PWD
                   SET USR-MODIFIED-YES TO TRUE

IS 
PASSWDI  OF COUSR2AI NOT = SEC-USR-PWD?
children.name:
IS 
PASSWDI  OF COUSR2AI NOT = SEC-USR-PWD?
children.originalText:
IF PASSWDI  OF COUSR2AI NOT = SEC-USR-PWD
                   MOVE PASSWDI  OF COUSR2AI TO SEC-USR-PWD
                   SET USR-MODIFIED-YES TO TRUE
               END-IF

children.label: MOVEUSRTYPEIOFC
children.name: MOVEUSRTYPEIOFC
children.originalText: MOVE USRTYPEI OF COUSR2AI TO SEC-USR-TYPE

children.label: SETUSR-MODIFIED
children.name: SETUSR-MODIFIED
children.originalText: SET USR-MODIFIED-YES TO TRUE

children.label: Yes
children.name: Yes
children.originalText:
MOVE USRTYPEI OF COUSR2AI TO SEC-USR-TYPE
                   SET USR-MODIFIED-YES TO TRUE

children.label:
IS 
USRTYPEI  OF COUSR2AI NOT = SEC-USR-TYPE?
children.name:
IS 
USRTYPEI  OF COUSR2AI NOT = SEC-USR-TYPE?
children.originalText:
IF USRTYPEI  OF COUSR2AI NOT = SEC-USR-TYPE
                   MOVE USRTYPEI OF COUSR2AI TO SEC-USR-TYPE
                   SET USR-MODIFIED-YES TO TRUE
               END-IF

children.label: Yes
children.name: Yes
children.originalText: PERFORM UPDATE-USER-SEC-FILE

                   MOVE 'Please modify to update ...' TO

children.label:
IS 
USR-MODIFIED-YES?
children.name:
IS 
USR-MODIFIED-YES?
children.originalText:
IF USR-MODIFIED-YES
                   PERFORM UPDATE-USER-SEC-FILE
               ELSE
                   MOVE 'Please modify to update ...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE DFHRED       TO ERRMSGC  OF COUSR2AO
                   PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
               END-IF

children.label: Yes
children.name: Yes
children.originalText:
MOVE USRIDINI  OF COUSR2AI TO SEC-USR-ID
               PERFORM READ-USER-SEC-FILE
       
               IF FNAMEI  OF COUSR2AI NOT = SEC-USR-FNAME
                   MOVE FNAMEI   OF COUSR2AI TO SEC-USR-FNAME
                   SET USR-MODIFIED-YES TO TRUE
               END-IF
               IF LNAMEI  OF COUSR2AI NOT = SEC-USR-LNAME
                   MOVE LNAMEI   OF COUSR2AI TO SEC-USR-LNAME
                   SET USR-MODIFIED-YES TO TRUE
               END-IF
               IF PASSWDI  OF COUSR2AI NOT = SEC-USR-PWD
                   MOVE PASSWDI  OF COUSR2AI TO SEC-USR-PWD
                   SET USR-MODIFIED-YES TO TRUE
               END-IF
               IF USRTYPEI  OF COUSR2AI NOT = SEC-USR-TYPE
                   MOVE USRTYPEI OF COUSR2AI TO SEC-USR-TYPE
                   SET USR-MODIFIED-YES TO TRUE
               END-IF
       
               IF USR-MODIFIED-YES
                   PERFORM UPDATE-USER-SEC-FILE
               ELSE
                   MOVE 'Please modify to update ...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE DFHRED       TO ERRMSGC  OF COUSR2AO
                   PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
               END-IF

children.label:
IS 
NOT ERR-FLG-ON?
children.name:
IS 
NOT ERR-FLG-ON?
children.originalText:
IF NOT ERR-FLG-ON
               MOVE USRIDINI  OF COUSR2AI TO SEC-USR-ID
               PERFORM READ-USER-SEC-FILE
       
               IF FNAMEI  OF COUSR2AI NOT = SEC-USR-FNAME
                   MOVE FNAMEI   OF COUSR2AI TO SEC-USR-FNAME
                   SET USR-MODIFIED-YES TO TRUE
               END-IF
               IF LNAMEI  OF COUSR2AI NOT = SEC-USR-LNAME
                   MOVE LNAMEI   OF COUSR2AI TO SEC-USR-LNAME
                   SET USR-MODIFIED-YES TO TRUE
               END-IF
               IF PASSWDI  OF COUSR2AI NOT = SEC-USR-PWD
                   MOVE PASSWDI  OF COUSR2AI TO SEC-USR-PWD
                   SET USR-MODIFIED-YES TO TRUE
               END-IF
               IF USRTYPEI  OF COUSR2AI NOT = SEC-USR-TYPE
                   MOVE USRTYPEI OF COUSR2AI TO SEC-USR-TYPE
                   SET USR-MODIFIED-YES TO TRUE
               END-IF
       
               IF USR-MODIFIED-YES
                   PERFORM UPDATE-USER-SEC-FILE
               ELSE
                   MOVE 'Please modify to update ...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE DFHRED       TO ERRMSGC  OF COUSR2AO
                   PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
               END-IF
       
           END-IF

children.label: EVALUATETRUEWHE
children.name: EVALUATETRUEWHE
children.originalText:
EVALUATE TRUE
               WHEN USRIDINI OF COUSR2AI = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'User ID can NOT be empty...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR2AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
               WHEN FNAMEI OF COUSR2AI = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'First Name can NOT be empty...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO FNAMEL OF COUSR2AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
               WHEN LNAMEI OF COUSR2AI = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Last Name can NOT be empty...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO LNAMEL OF COUSR2AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
               WHEN PASSWDI OF COUSR2AI = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Password can NOT be empty...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO PASSWDL OF COUSR2AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
               WHEN USRTYPEI OF COUSR2AI = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'User Type can NOT be empty...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USRTYPEL OF COUSR2AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
                   MOVE -1       TO FNAMEL OF COUSR2AI
                   CONTINUE
           END-EVALUATE
       
           IF NOT ERR-FLG-ON
               MOVE USRIDINI  OF COUSR2AI TO SEC-USR-ID
               PERFORM READ-USER-SEC-FILE
       
               IF FNAMEI  OF COUSR2AI NOT = SEC-USR-FNAME
                   MOVE FNAMEI   OF COUSR2AI TO SEC-USR-FNAME
                   SET USR-MODIFIED-YES TO TRUE
               END-IF
               IF LNAMEI  OF COUSR2AI NOT = SEC-USR-LNAME
                   MOVE LNAMEI   OF COUSR2AI TO SEC-USR-LNAME
                   SET USR-MODIFIED-YES TO TRUE
               END-IF
               IF PASSWDI  OF COUSR2AI NOT = SEC-USR-PWD
                   MOVE PASSWDI  OF COUSR2AI TO SEC-USR-PWD
                   SET USR-MODIFIED-YES TO TRUE
               END-IF
               IF USRTYPEI  OF COUSR2AI NOT = SEC-USR-TYPE
                   MOVE USRTYPEI OF COUSR2AI TO SEC-USR-TYPE
                   SET USR-MODIFIED-YES TO TRUE
               END-IF
       
               IF USR-MODIFIED-YES
                   PERFORM UPDATE-USER-SEC-FILE
               ELSE
                   MOVE 'Please modify to update ...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE DFHRED       TO ERRMSGC  OF COUSR2AO
                   PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
               END-IF
       
           END-IF.

children.label: MOVEFUNCTIONCUR
children.name: MOVEFUNCTIONCUR
children.originalText:
MOVE FUNCTION CURRENT-DATE  TO WS-CURDATE-DATA
       
           MOVE CCDA-TITLE01           TO TITLE01O OF COUSR2AO
           MOVE CCDA-TITLE02           TO TITLE02O OF COUSR2AO
           MOVE WS-TRANID              TO TRNNAMEO OF COUSR2AO
           MOVE WS-PGMNAME             TO PGMNAMEO OF COUSR2AO
       
           MOVE WS-CURDATE-MONTH       TO WS-CURDATE-MM
           MOVE WS-CURDATE-DAY         TO WS-CURDATE-DD
           MOVE WS-CURDATE-YEAR(3:2)   TO WS-CURDATE-YY
       
           MOVE WS-CURDATE-MM-DD-YY    TO CURDATEO OF COUSR2AO
       
           MOVE WS-CURTIME-HOURS       TO WS-CURTIME-HH
           MOVE WS-CURTIME-MINUTE      TO WS-CURTIME-MM
           MOVE WS-CURTIME-SECOND      TO WS-CURTIME-SS
       
           MOVE WS-CURTIME-HH-MM-SS    TO CURTIMEO OF COUSR2AO.

children.label: EVALUATE
children.name: EVALUATE
children.originalText:
EVALUATE WS-RESP-CD
               WHEN _DIALECT_ 6 ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                   CONTINUE
                   MOVE 'Press PF5 key to save your updates ...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE DFHNEUTR       TO ERRMSGC  OF COUSR2AO
                   PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
               WHEN _DIALECT_ 7 ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'User ID NOT found...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR2AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
                   DISPLAY 'RESP:' WS-RESP-CD 'REAS:' WS-REAS-CD
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Unable to lookup User...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO FNAMEL OF COUSR2AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
           END-EVALUATE

                   MOVE 'Press PF5 key to save your updates ...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE DFHNEUTR       TO ERRMSGC  OF COUSR2AO
                   PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
               WHEN _DIALECT_ 7 ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'User ID NOT found...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR2AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER

EVALUATE WS-RESP-CD
               WHEN _DIALECT_ 9 ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                   MOVE SPACES             TO WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE DFHGREEN           TO ERRMSGC  OF COUSR2AO
                   STRING 'User '     DELIMITED BY SIZE
                          SEC-USR-ID  DELIMITED BY SPACE
                          ' has been updated ...' DELIMITED BY SIZE
                     INTO WS-MESSAGE
                   PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
               WHEN _DIALECT_ 10 ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'User ID NOT found...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR2AI

               WHEN OTHER

                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Unable to Update User...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO FNAMEL OF COUSR2AI

                   MOVE DFHGREEN           TO ERRMSGC  OF COUSR2AO

label: ProcedureDivisionBodyContext/897bc36d-fda2-4b65-bf91-bfb1979dfde9
name: ProcedureDivisionBodyContext/897bc36d-fda2-4b65-bf91-bfb1979dfde9
originalText:
MAIN-PARA.
       
           SET ERR-FLG-OFF     TO TRUE
           SET USR-MODIFIED-NO TO TRUE
       
           MOVE SPACES TO WS-MESSAGE
                          ERRMSGO OF COUSR2AO
       
           IF EIBCALEN = 0
               MOVE 'COSGN00C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
               PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
           ELSE
               MOVE DFHCOMMAREA(1:EIBCALEN) TO CARDDEMO-COMMAREA
               IF NOT CDEMO-PGM-REENTER
                   SET CDEMO-PGM-REENTER    TO TRUE
                   MOVE LOW-VALUES          TO COUSR2AO
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR2AI
                   IF CDEMO-CU02-USR-SELECTED NOT =
                                              SPACES AND LOW-VALUES
                       MOVE CDEMO-CU02-USR-SELECTED TO
                            USRIDINI OF COUSR2AI
                       PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                   END-IF
                   PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
               ELSE
                   PERFORM RECEIVE-USRUPD-SCREEN
                   EVALUATE EIBAID
                       WHEN DFHENTER
                           PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                       WHEN DFHPF3
                           PERFORM UPDATE-USER-INFO
                           IF CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                               MOVE 'COADM01C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           ELSE
                               MOVE CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM TO
                               CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           END-IF
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF4
                           PERFORM CLEAR-CURRENT-SCREEN
                       WHEN DFHPF5
                           PERFORM UPDATE-USER-INFO
                       WHEN DFHPF12
                           MOVE 'COADM01C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
                           PERFORM RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
                       WHEN OTHER
                           MOVE 'Y'                       TO WS-ERR-FLG
                           MOVE CCDA-MSG-INVALID-KEY      TO WS-MESSAGE
                           PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
                   END-EVALUATE
               END-IF
           END-IF
       
           _DIALECT_ 1 ​​​​ ​​​​ ​​​​​​
                     ​​​​​​​ ​​​​​​​​​​​
           ​​​​​​​​.
       
       
       
       
       PROCESS-ENTER-KEY.
       
           EVALUATE TRUE
               WHEN USRIDINI OF COUSR2AI = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'User ID can NOT be empty...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR2AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR2AI
                   CONTINUE
           END-EVALUATE
       
           IF NOT ERR-FLG-ON
               MOVE SPACES      TO FNAMEI   OF COUSR2AI
                                   LNAMEI   OF COUSR2AI
                                   PASSWDI  OF COUSR2AI
                                   USRTYPEI OF COUSR2AI
               MOVE USRIDINI  OF COUSR2AI TO SEC-USR-ID
               PERFORM READ-USER-SEC-FILE
           END-IF.
       
           IF NOT ERR-FLG-ON
               MOVE SEC-USR-FNAME      TO FNAMEI    OF COUSR2AI
               MOVE SEC-USR-LNAME      TO LNAMEI    OF COUSR2AI
               MOVE SEC-USR-PWD        TO PASSWDI   OF COUSR2AI
               MOVE SEC-USR-TYPE       TO USRTYPEI  OF COUSR2AI
               PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
           END-IF.
       
       
       
       
       UPDATE-USER-INFO.
       
           EVALUATE TRUE
               WHEN USRIDINI OF COUSR2AI = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'User ID can NOT be empty...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR2AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
               WHEN FNAMEI OF COUSR2AI = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'First Name can NOT be empty...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO FNAMEL OF COUSR2AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
               WHEN LNAMEI OF COUSR2AI = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Last Name can NOT be empty...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO LNAMEL OF COUSR2AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
               WHEN PASSWDI OF COUSR2AI = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Password can NOT be empty...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO PASSWDL OF COUSR2AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
               WHEN USRTYPEI OF COUSR2AI = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'User Type can NOT be empty...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USRTYPEL OF COUSR2AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
                   MOVE -1       TO FNAMEL OF COUSR2AI
                   CONTINUE
           END-EVALUATE
       
           IF NOT ERR-FLG-ON
               MOVE USRIDINI  OF COUSR2AI TO SEC-USR-ID
               PERFORM READ-USER-SEC-FILE
       
               IF FNAMEI  OF COUSR2AI NOT = SEC-USR-FNAME
                   MOVE FNAMEI   OF COUSR2AI TO SEC-USR-FNAME
                   SET USR-MODIFIED-YES TO TRUE
               END-IF
               IF LNAMEI  OF COUSR2AI NOT = SEC-USR-LNAME
                   MOVE LNAMEI   OF COUSR2AI TO SEC-USR-LNAME
                   SET USR-MODIFIED-YES TO TRUE
               END-IF
               IF PASSWDI  OF COUSR2AI NOT = SEC-USR-PWD
                   MOVE PASSWDI  OF COUSR2AI TO SEC-USR-PWD
                   SET USR-MODIFIED-YES TO TRUE
               END-IF
               IF USRTYPEI  OF COUSR2AI NOT = SEC-USR-TYPE
                   MOVE USRTYPEI OF COUSR2AI TO SEC-USR-TYPE
                   SET USR-MODIFIED-YES TO TRUE
               END-IF
       
               IF USR-MODIFIED-YES
                   PERFORM UPDATE-USER-SEC-FILE
               ELSE
                   MOVE 'Please modify to update ...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE DFHRED       TO ERRMSGC  OF COUSR2AO
                   PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
               END-IF
       
           END-IF.
       
       
       
       
       RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN.
       
           IF CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM = LOW-VALUES OR SPACES
               MOVE 'COSGN00C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
           END-IF
           MOVE WS-TRANID    TO CDEMO-FROM-TRANID
           MOVE WS-PGMNAME   TO CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM
           MOVE ZEROS        TO CDEMO-PGM-CONTEXT
           _DIALECT_ 2 ​​​​ ​​​​
               ​​​​ ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
           ​​​​​​​​.
       
       
       
       
       SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN.
       
           PERFORM POPULATE-HEADER-INFO
       
           MOVE WS-MESSAGE TO ERRMSGO OF COUSR2AO
       
           _DIALECT_ 3 ​​​​ ​​​​ ​​​​
                     ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                     ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                     ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                     ​​​​​
           ​​​​​​​​.
       
       
       
       
       RECEIVE-USRUPD-SCREEN.
       
           _DIALECT_ 4 ​​​​ ​​​​ ​​​​​​​
                     ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                     ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                     ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                     ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
           ​​​​​​​​.
       
       
       
       
       POPULATE-HEADER-INFO.
       
           MOVE FUNCTION CURRENT-DATE  TO WS-CURDATE-DATA
       
           MOVE CCDA-TITLE01           TO TITLE01O OF COUSR2AO
           MOVE CCDA-TITLE02           TO TITLE02O OF COUSR2AO
           MOVE WS-TRANID              TO TRNNAMEO OF COUSR2AO
           MOVE WS-PGMNAME             TO PGMNAMEO OF COUSR2AO
       
           MOVE WS-CURDATE-MONTH       TO WS-CURDATE-MM
           MOVE WS-CURDATE-DAY         TO WS-CURDATE-DD
           MOVE WS-CURDATE-YEAR(3:2)   TO WS-CURDATE-YY
       
           MOVE WS-CURDATE-MM-DD-YY    TO CURDATEO OF COUSR2AO
       
           MOVE WS-CURTIME-HOURS       TO WS-CURTIME-HH
           MOVE WS-CURTIME-MINUTE      TO WS-CURTIME-MM
           MOVE WS-CURTIME-SECOND      TO WS-CURTIME-SS
       
           MOVE WS-CURTIME-HH-MM-SS    TO CURTIMEO OF COUSR2AO.
       
       
       
       
       READ-USER-SEC-FILE.
       
           _DIALECT_ 5 ​​​​ ​​​​ ​​​​
                ​​​​​​​   ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                ​​​​      ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                ​​​​​​    ​​​​​​​ ​​ ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                ​​​​​​    ​​​​​​​​​​​​
                ​​​​​​​​​ ​​​​​​​ ​​ ​​​​​​​​​​​
                ​​​​​​
                ​​​​      ​​​​​​​​​​​​
           ​​​​​​​​.
       
           EVALUATE WS-RESP-CD
               WHEN _DIALECT_ 6 ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                   CONTINUE
                   MOVE 'Press PF5 key to save your updates ...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE DFHNEUTR       TO ERRMSGC  OF COUSR2AO
                   PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
               WHEN _DIALECT_ 7 ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'User ID NOT found...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR2AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
                   DISPLAY 'RESP:' WS-RESP-CD 'REAS:' WS-REAS-CD
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Unable to lookup User...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO FNAMEL OF COUSR2AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
           END-EVALUATE.
       
       
       
       
       UPDATE-USER-SEC-FILE.
       
           _DIALECT_ 8 ​​​​ ​​​​ ​​​​​​​
                ​​​​​​​   ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                ​​​​      ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                ​​​​​​    ​​​​​​​ ​​ ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                ​​​​      ​​​​​​​​​​​​
           ​​​​​​​​.
       
           EVALUATE WS-RESP-CD
               WHEN _DIALECT_ 9 ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                   MOVE SPACES             TO WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE DFHGREEN           TO ERRMSGC  OF COUSR2AO
                   STRING 'User '     DELIMITED BY SIZE
                          SEC-USR-ID  DELIMITED BY SPACE
                          ' has been updated ...' DELIMITED BY SIZE
                     INTO WS-MESSAGE
                   PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
               WHEN _DIALECT_ 10 ​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'User ID NOT found...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR2AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
                   DISPLAY 'RESP:' WS-RESP-CD 'REAS:' WS-REAS-CD
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Unable to Update User...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO FNAMEL OF COUSR2AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN
           END-EVALUATE.
       
       
       
       
       CLEAR-CURRENT-SCREEN.
       
           PERFORM INITIALIZE-ALL-FIELDS.
           PERFORM SEND-USRUPD-SCREEN.
       
       
       
       
       INITIALIZE-ALL-FIELDS.
       
           MOVE -1              TO USRIDINL OF COUSR2AI
           MOVE SPACES          TO USRIDINI OF COUSR2AI
                                   FNAMEI   OF COUSR2AI
                                   LNAMEI   OF COUSR2AI
                                   PASSWDI  OF COUSR2AI
                                   USRTYPEI OF COUSR2AI
                                   WS-MESSAGE.
